base-domain/src/main/java/pl/piomin/base.general_idea: Initialize the order status to 'NEW' in the constructor to ensure a defined initial state.

order-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin/or.general_idea: Remove inline random order generation fields and commented-out runner code to clean up the main application class.
order-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin/or.human_impl: Removed `private static Random RAND`, `private AtomicLong id`, and the commented-out `ApplicationRunner` bean.

order-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin/or.general_idea: Replace inline lambda logic for order confirmation with a call to a dedicated service method to improve separation of concerns.
order-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin/or.human_impl: Changed stream join lambda `(o1, o2) -> new Order(...)` to `orderManageService::confirm`.

order-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin/or.general_idea: Inject the new OrderManageService dependency into the main application class to support the refactored confirmation logic.
order-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin/or.human_impl: Added `@Autowired OrderManageService orderManageService;` and corresponding imports.

payment-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin/.general_idea: Replace javax.annotation imports with jakarta.annotation to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
Introduce net.datafaker library to generate realistic test data instead of hardcoded strings.
payment-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin/.human_impl: import net.datafaker.Faker; Faker faker = new Faker();

payment-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin/.general_idea: Replace static 'Customer' + index naming with dynamic full names generated by DataFaker.
Use Random.nextInt(origin, bound) instead of nextInt(bound) to ensure a minimum value range.
Replace javax.persistence imports with jakarta.persistence to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3 and Java 21.
Correct the order status string from 'REJECTED' to 'REJECT' to align with expected enum or constant values.

stock-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin/st.general_idea: Replace javax.annotation.PostConstruct with jakarta.annotation.PostConstruct to align with Jakarta EE namespace required by Spring Boot 3.x and Java 21.
Update Random.nextInt usage to the two-argument overload to generate numbers within a specific range, leveraging API improvements or best practices in newer Java versions.
Replace javax.persistence imports with jakarta.persistence to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3 and Java 21.

base-domain/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties from Java 17 to Java 21 to enforce compilation for the new JDK version.
Remove parent POM inheritance and inline groupId and version to decouple the module from the parent project structure.
Add SonarQube module key property to support static code analysis configuration.

order-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent from 2.6.2 to 3.1.4 to align with Java 21 and modern Spring ecosystem.
Update the project's target Java version property from 17 to 21.
Add SonarQube module key property for code quality analysis integration.
Upgrade springdoc-openapi-ui to version 1.7.0 for compatibility with Spring Boot 3.
Add spring-boot-starter-test dependency for unit and integration testing support.
Add spring-kafka-test dependency for testing Kafka producers and consumers.
Add spring-boot-testcontainers dependency to enable Testcontainers support in Spring Boot tests.
Add testcontainers kafka module to spin up Kafka instances for integration tests.
Add a Maven profile to optionally include spring-boot-docker-compose for local development.
Add a Maven profile with Jib plugin to build Docker images during the package phase.

payment-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent from 2.6.2 to 3.1.4 to align with Java 21 and modern Spring ecosystem.
Update the project's target Java version property from 17 to 21.
Add SonarQube module key property for code quality analysis integration.
Add Datafaker library for generating fake data in tests.
Add Spring Boot Starter Test dependency for unit and integration testing support.
Add Spring Kafka Test dependency for testing Kafka producers and consumers.
Add Spring Boot Testcontainers starter for integration testing with containers.
Add Testcontainers Kafka module to spin up Kafka instances for testing.
Add a Maven profile to enable Docker Compose support via Spring Boot.
Add a Maven profile to build Docker images using Jib plugin.

pom.xml.general_idea: Explicitly set the Java version property to 21 to align with the target JDK.
Add SonarCloud configuration properties for code quality analysis.
Add the JaCoCo Maven plugin to enable code coverage reporting.

stock-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent from 2.6.2 to 3.1.4 to align with Java 21 and modern Spring ecosystem.
Configure the project to compile and run on Java 21.
Add SonarQube module key property for code quality analysis integration.
Add Spring Boot starter test dependency for unit and integration testing support.
Add Spring Kafka test dependency for testing Kafka producers and consumers.
Add Spring Boot Testcontainers support for integration testing with containers.
Add Testcontainers Kafka module to spin up Kafka instances for tests.
Add a 'compose' profile to optionally include Docker Compose support for local development.
Add a 'build-image' profile to configure Jib for building Docker images during the package phase.
